name: Expense-to-group assignment & summaries
description: Add expense-to-group assignment and group summary views. Backend: adds groupIds to expense create/update schemas and handlers (prerequisite not yet wired), PATCH /api/v1/expenses/:id/groups (bulk replace group assignments for an existing expense), GET /api/v1/groups/:id/summary (total spend, expense count, budget remaining, member contribution breakdown). Frontend: Group Detail page at /groups/[id] showing the group summary card and a filtered expense list for that group; group multi-select in expense form; bulk-assign modal allowing users to retroactively tag multiple existing expenses to a group. Per docs/product-specs/expense-grouping.md.
